productDisplayName: Nike Men Toki Premium Purple Casual Shoes
description: Style Note A shoe with urban flair and casual style, this nike Toki Premium shoe is a good looking pair. Your shoe closet absolutely needs this casual essential. Perfect for college wear or coffee dates, you can style this with a tonal monochrome tee. Product Details Blunt toed shoe with no overmid-top styling and central lace-ups Nike swoosh at the backfoot (perforations all over) PU midsole with foxing Exaggerated herringbone grooves in the TPU outsole Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
